questions.q: As highlighted in a May 17, 2026 publication, paleontologists in Spain uncovered the best-preserved skull in Europe belonging to which plated dinosaur?
According to a May 17, 2026 report, Microsoft's $1 billion AI data center project in Kenya hit a major hurdle because meeting its power needs would require doing what?
options: Switching off half the country's electricity
questions.correctText: Switching off half the country's electricity

questions.q: According to a major review highlighted by ScienceDaily on May 17, 2026, what longstanding fear regarding 'yo-yo dieting' is largely unsupported by scientific evidence?
options: That it permanently ruins metabolism and causes long-term harm
That it inevitably causes severe hair loss
That it guarantees the development of Type 1 Diabetes
That it permanently shrinks the human stomach
questions.correctText: That it permanently ruins metabolism and causes long-term harm

questions.q: Which multimillionaire Vancouver developer was jailed for 40 days in May 2026 after repeatedly ignoring court orders regarding her finances?
As reported on the weekend of May 17, 2026, a Canadian in isolation in B.C. presumptively tested positive for what virus after leaving a cruise ship?
Which country won the 70th Eurovision Song Contest in May 2026 with the party anthem 'Bangaranga'?
Which company debuted its AI-iPanel, an AI-powered distribution cabinet, at the OPTATEC Photonics and Laser Exhibition in Frankfurt, as reported on May 17, 2026?
On May 17, 2026, the WHO declared a public health emergency of international concern due to an outbreak of which Ebola virus strain?
On May 17, 2026, which entertainment giant pulled back the curtain on its Imagineering robotics lab to showcase how its next-generation characters come to life?
